# CampusPerk

> CampusPerk is a student-first deals and perks platform that aggregates, verifies, and alerts college students to every student discount — software, tech, food, fashion, travel, and more — in one dashboard.

CampusPerk requires a verified .edu email to access personalized deals. Public marketing, pricing, and legal pages are listed below.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CampusPerk, featured student deals, and waitlist signup.
- [About](/about): Who CampusPerk serves (students, faculty, staff, alumni) and the categories of deals covered.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free vs Premium plan comparison.
- [Partners](/partners): Information for brands interested in offering deals to students.
- [Partner Request](/partners/request): Request a brand or local business to be added to CampusPerk.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the CampusPerk team for partnerships, press, or support.
- [Sign In](/sign-in): Existing user login.
- [Sign Up](/sign-up): Create an account with a verified .edu email.
- [Waitlist](/waitlist): Join the launch waitlist and get a referral code.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How CampusPerk collects and protects user data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the CampusPerk platform.
